items.title: Tonali inspires Newcastle to win over Villa in controversial tie
items.description: Sandro Tonali scores twice as Newcastle United overcome multiple controversial refereeing decisions to knock 10-man Aston Villa out of the FA Cup.

items.title: GB women shock curling world champions Canada
items.description: Great Britain's women curlers kickstart their campaign with a superb first victory of the 2026 Winter Olympics while GB's men also won but three Briti...

items.title: Rubio says US and Europe 'belong together' despite tensions
items.description: The US secretary of state reassures European leaders that the Trump administration backs the transatlantic alliance.

items.title: Rejuvenated Scotland sweep England aside in stunning Calcutta Cup win
items.description: Rampant Scotland bounce back from Six Nations defeat by Italy to blow England away in a bonus-point win in a pulsating Calcutta Cup at a riotous Murra...
